briefdescription.para: Perform FFT on input[col] and write the result into output[col].

memberdef.name: SCOPE_UpdateOscilloscopeData

briefdescription.para: Prepares a subset/copy of DAQDataWave for displaying it in the oscilloscope panel.

parameterdescription.para: Only for TEST_PULSE_MODE and multi device mode; Selects the testpulse to extract
Position of the hardware DAQ fifo to keep track of the position which will be written next

briefdescription.para: Adjusts the fifo position when using ITC.
